summary: Plan-only classification for the two open job candidates. #87180 remains the live canonical issue. #89039 is the related candidate fix for the same root cause, but it is not merge-ready because the latest ClawSweeper review still says needs changes and the PR is marked waiting on author; no close, merge, or fix PR is allowed by this job.

actions.reason: #87180 is the clearest surviving issue for the root cause and should remain open as canonical while the fix path is reviewed.
#89039 is the candidate fix for the canonical issue, but unresolved review state and job action limits make merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout unsafe in this plan run.
